title: rubus × stenobelus
intro: Rubus × stenibelus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus). This plant is rich in antioxidants and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Rubus × stenibelus include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestive health, and provide anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and jams, and are often used to support overall well-being and immune function.
